title: THE MISSION - 211info
text: NORTHWEST MBTC THE MISSION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a Christian-based transitional sober housing program up to 12 months, with structured stages supporting long-term recovery. Includes an initial 60-day blackout period with no phone or visitors to help residents focus on adjustment and recovery, and requires 5.5 hours of daily Bible study. 35045 SW Bald Peak Road Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Age 18 and older in recovery from substance abuse disorders. Must not have a registered sex offense. Hours: Phone: 7 days per week 7am-10pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 632-1953 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 632-1953 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST MBTC
